stories.title: Nvidia's new Synthetic Video Detector can identify fake AI videos with up to 92% accuracy — microservice based on cutting-edge research looks to combat misinformation in broadcasts with just 22ms processing time

sources.title: Nvidia's new Synthetic Video Detector can identify fake AI videos with up to 92% accuracy — microservice based on cutting-edge research looks to combat misinformation in broadcasts with just 22ms processing time
sources.title_en: Nvidia's new Synthetic Video Detector can identify fake AI videos with up to 92% accuracy — microservice based on cutting-edge research looks to combat misinformation in broadcasts with just 22ms processing time
sources.title_original: Nvidia's new Synthetic Video Detector can identify fake AI videos with up to 92% accuracy — microservice based on cutting-edge research looks to combat misinformation in broadcasts with just 22ms processing time
sources.summary: Nvidia has just created an antidote to the virus that is AI misinformation. The company's new Synthetic Video Detector can help broadcasters assess 1080p footage at scale with processing times of just 22ms and up 92% accuracy for uncompressed videos.
sources.summary_zh: 英伟达刚刚创造了一种病毒的解药，那就是人工智能错误信息。该公司的新型合成视频检测器可以帮助广播公司大规模评估 1080p 素材，处理时间仅为 22 毫秒，未压缩视频的准确度高达 92%。

stories.title: 人工智能经济的持久悖论——模型变得更好、更高效，但成本仍然很容易失控 / The enduring paradox of the AI economy — models get better and more efficient, yet costs can still easily spiral out of control

stories.title: Government can seize private land to make way for new AI data center transmission lines, report says — takeovers could be implemented using eminent domain law when private citizens refuse to sell land

sources.title_original: Government can seize private land to make way for new AI data center transmission lines, report says — takeovers could be implemented using eminent domain law when private citizens refuse to sell land
sources.summary: Utilities can use eminent domain to seize private land for new transmission lines needed to power data centers, though public-use and state-law limits still apply.
